hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,os,glob; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); n=len(glob.glob('charts/*.png')); print(f'Chart saved: {os.path.basename(p)} — {n}/5 charts complete') if p.replace(chr(92),'/').find('charts/')!=-1 and p.endswith('.png') else None"

python -c "import json,sys,datetime; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','')[:120]; interrupted=d.get('tool_response',{}).get('interrupted', False); stderr=d.get('tool_response',{}).get('stderr',''); status='FAILED' if (interrupted or stderr) else 'OK'; f=open('session-log.md','a'); f.write(f\"{datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')} | status:{status} | {cmd}\n\")"
